notes: Sourced from the official Kramer VIA GO² User Manual Rev 5 (P/N 2900-301300), hosted on Markertek. The spec table definitively lists: Ports — 1 Ethernet (RJ-45), 1 USB 3.0 (female Type-A), 1 USB 2.0 (female Type-A); Outputs — 1 HDMI (female HDMI connector). Power is 12V DC via included external adapter (dc-barrel). The manual body references an 'HDMI IN Connector' feature for presenting from a wired HDMI source, but the official spec table only lists the one HDMI port under Outputs — it may be the same physical connector used bidirectionally depending on firmware/mode. Not rack-mountable (7×7×3.34 cm compact form factor).

ports.name: HDMI
ports.note: Labeled 'HDMI™ Connector' (item 6 in the product diagram). Official spec table lists it under Outputs. Manual Rev 5 also describes an HDMI IN feature (software-switchable), but the hardware spec table lists only one HDMI port under Outputs.

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: Labeled 'RJ-45 Connector' (item 7). Used for LAN network connectivity.

ports.name: USB 3.0
ports.note: Labeled 'USB 3.0 Connector' (item 3). Female Type-A. Used for keyboard, mouse, or other USB peripherals.

ports.name: USB 2.0
ports.note: Labeled 'USB 2.0 Connector' (item 4). Female Type-A. Used for keyboard, mouse, or other USB peripherals.

ports.name: Power
ports.note: Labeled 'Power Connector' (item 8). Connects to included 12V DC / 2A external power adapter.
